case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. FAIRMONT SPECIALTY GROUP

docket_entries.description: NON-OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BOND FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-24-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAIRMONT SPECIALTY GROUP $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,180.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: REAL PARTY IN INTEREST BAD BOYS BAIL BONDS, INC. AND FAIRMONT SPECIALTY GROUP'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND IS GRANTED. NON-OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
